scripts.build:web: cd apps/frontend && npx expo export --platform web
scripts.test: bun test packages/protocol apps/daemon apps/runner apps/cli apps/relay
scripts.type-check:all: npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/daemon/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/relay/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/runner/tsconfig.json && cd apps/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
